meaning: n.[解](=abducens nerve)外展神经,外展肌肉
examples: Objective: To provide applied anatomical data of abducens nerve for the skull base surgery.
Methods in July, 1997, a 26-year-old man was admitted for right-sided severe headache, dizziness, nausea, vomiting, facial and abducens nerve palsy.
METHODS: After evisceration, the abducens oculi muscle and the optic nerve were cut, and the hydroxyapatite sphere was implanted primarily in the muscular pyramid.
